sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7206" key="a)napitusmo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀναπιτ-υσμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n7206.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">spirting out,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0559.tlg002:4:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.3</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀναπυτίζω.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
